items.title: Derrick Jones Jr. was on the Mavericks in 2024, ending the Clippers season and closing their window.
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
Derrick Jones Jr. was on the Mavericks in 2024, ending the Clippers season and closing their window. 

Kai Jones was on the team by the end of the year, replacing Joshua Primo
